title: Purchasing Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate the activities of buyers, purchasing officers, and related workers involved in purchasing materials, products, and services. Includes wholesale or retail trade merchandising managers and procurement managers.

tasks.text: Develop and implement purchasing and contract management instructions, policies, and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Locate vendors of materials, equipment or supplies, and interview them to determine product availability and terms of sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare bid awards requiring board approval.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct and coordinate activities of personnel engaged in buying, selling, and distributing materials, equipment, machinery, and supplies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review purchase order claims and contracts for conformance to company policy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Review, evaluate, and approve specifications for issuing and awarding bids.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare and process requisitions and purchase orders for supplies and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interview and hire staff, and oversee staff training.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop cost reduction strategies and savings plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Resolve vendor or contractor grievances and claims against suppliers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze market and delivery systems to assess present and future material availability.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Participate in the development of specifications for equipment, products, or substitute materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain records of goods ordered and received.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Represent companies in negotiating contracts and formulating policies with suppliers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports regarding market conditions and merchandise costs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange for disposal of surplus materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
